title: senecio angulatus
intro: Senecio angulatus, also known as Buttercup Ragwort, is a flowering plant native to Australia and New Zealand. The plant's leaves and flowers have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, which include acting as a stimulant and having anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Senecio angulatus include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory issues, and aiding in the treatment of skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Senecio angulatus can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, with the dried leaves and flowers often being used in herbal remedies.
